pr.title: Match grShrineRoute_8020A104, cleanup callback function names
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched grShrineRoute_8020A104 and cleaned up several Shrine Route stage callback names. The match used newly exposed baselib debug/lobj APIs, a Shrine Route-specific Ground union variant, and more precise header prototypes for light object traversal/storage. It also replaced generic fn_8020AD24-style symbols and address-only callback names with grShrineRoute-prefixed or On* callback names in code, headers, and GALE01 symbols.
what_changed: grShrineRoute_8020A104 now gets the Ground object from the Ground_GObj, finds the first HSD_GObj entity with classifier 0xC, asserts it exists, stores it in Shrine Route ground vars, initializes it via grShrineRoute_8020AA40, walks its HSD_LObj chain, records light objects and their flags, stores results from grShrineRoute_8020AB58 and grShrineRoute_8020AC44, then calls grShrineRoute_8020A21C.
Added includes for baselib/debug.h and baselib/lobj.h in grshrineroute.c to support HSD_ASSERT and HSD_LObj accessors.
Renamed stage lifecycle callbacks from address-only names to semantic callback names: grShrineRoute_OnDemoInit, grShrineRoute_OnInit, grShrineRoute_OnLoad, and grShrineRoute_OnStart.
Renamed StageData callback references to use the new On* names.
Renamed grShrineRoute_8020B104 to grShrineRoute_OnTouchLine and grShrineRoute_8020B10C to grShrineRoute_OnCheckShadowRender.
Renamed fn_8020AD24 to grShrineRoute_8020AD24 and updated placeholder comments for fn_8020AD58/fn_8020AE08 to grShrineRoute-prefixed names.
Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt to reflect the callback and fn_* renames.

Updated grshrineroute.h with forward includes, baselib forward declarations, callback renames, and more specific prototypes for grShrineRoute_8020AA40, grShrineRoute_8020AB58, and grShrineRoute_8020AC44.
Added struct grShrineroute_GroundVars2 to src/melee/gr/types.h and inserted it into the Ground union as shrineroute2 for the newly matched code path.
smart_moves: Kept symbol, header, and C implementation names synchronized, avoiding a partial rename that would make future symbol lookup harder.
Used semantic OnInit/OnLoad/OnStart/OnTouchLine/OnCheckShadowRender names for functions whose roles are established by StageData callback slots.
Introduced a second Shrine Route ground-vars struct rather than forcing the newly matched light-object fields into the older smaller grShrineroute_GroundVars layout.
Improved prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS where the matched function established concrete types, especially HSD_GObj* and HSD_LObj*.
Matched the light-object traversal using existing baselib accessors such as HSD_GObjGetClassifier, HSD_GObjGetNext, HSD_LObjGetFlags, and HSD_LObjGetNext instead of open-coding field access.
Preserved unresolved functions as address-named placeholders where behavior was not yet matched, while still replacing generic fn_* names with module-prefixed names.
decomp_lessons: StageData callback slots are strong evidence for naming lifecycle functions with OnDemoInit, OnInit, OnLoad, OnStart, OnTouchLine, and OnCheckShadowRender-style names.
When matching code that stores per-stage state beyond an existing struct's known size, add a stage-specific GroundVars variant to the Ground union rather than overloading unrelated fields.
A function match can justify tightening nearby prototypes; doing so helps later matches by reducing casts and UNK_PARAMS usage.
If a function searches global HSD_GObj entity lists by classifier, baselib accessor functions and HSD_ASSERT may be needed to reproduce the original code shape.
Symbol-table cleanup should accompany source/header renames so future searches by address and name remain coherent.
Generic fn_<address> names should be converted to the owning module prefix once the enclosing file/system is known, even if the exact semantic name is not yet known.
naming_conventions: Use grShrineRoute_OnDemoInit for the StageData demo-init callback at 0x802087B8.
Use grShrineRoute_OnInit for the StageData init callback at 0x802087BC.
Use grShrineRoute_OnLoad for the StageData load callback at 0x8020882C.
Use grShrineRoute_OnStart for the StageData start callback at 0x80208850.
Use grShrineRoute_OnTouchLine for the touch-line callback at 0x8020B104.
Use grShrineRoute_OnCheckShadowRender for the shadow-render callback at 0x8020B10C.
Replace generic fn_8020AD24/fn_8020AD58/fn_8020AE08 names with grShrineRoute_8020AD24/grShrineRoute_8020AD58/grShrineRoute_8020AE08 when only module ownership is known.
Keep address comments in headers, such as /* 20A104 */, while upgrading function names and prototypes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: The matched grShrineRoute_8020A104 iterates HSD_GObj_Entities->xC until HSD_GObjGetClassifier(lgobj) equals 0xC, then asserts the object was found with HSD_ASSERT(1106, lgobj).
The function stores the found light GObj in gp->gv.shrineroute2.xC4 and calls grShrineRoute_8020AA40 on that object before traversing lights.
Light objects are obtained with GET_LOBJ and traversed with HSD_LObjGetNext.
The implementation stores HSD_LObj pointers and corresponding HSD_LObjGetFlags values using pointer arithmetic over adjacent fields, which likely helped match the original memory layout.
The Shrine Route ground-vars layout includes xC4, xC8, x118, x168, x16C, and x170 offsets to support the matched stores without inventing fully semantic field names.
Added baselib/lobj.h and baselib/debug.h because matching required HSD_LObj accessors and HSD_ASSERT.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR had one issue comment according to counts, but no comment body was included in the excerpt, so no human review intent can be inferred.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs matching grShrineRoute_8020AA40, grShrineRoute_8020AB58, or grShrineRoute_8020AC44.
Check whether grShrineroute_GroundVars2 fields xC4, xC8, x118, x168, x16C, and x170 received semantic names later.
Search for other stage files where StageData callbacks were renamed from address-only names to OnInit/OnLoad/OnStart patterns.
Look for later cleanup of grShrineRoute_8020AD58 and grShrineRoute_8020AE08.
Compare other stage light-object setup functions that iterate HSD_GObj_Entities by classifier 0xC.
